introLines.text: I'm not sure what I experienced, but I had to call someone.
Something strange happened and I can't stop thinking about it.
This might sound crazy, but hear me out, Vern.

detailLines.text: It could have been nothing, but it felt significant somehow.
I've tried to find a rational explanation. Nothing fits.
Other people have noticed things too. We can't all be wrong.

defenseLines.text: I'm not saying it's supernatural, but it's not normal either.
I know how this sounds. I wouldn't believe me either.

acceptanceLines.text: Maybe I should look into it more.
I hadn't thought of it that way.

conclusionLines.text: I feel better just talking about it.
I'll call back if anything else happens.
